name: Through the Ages
description:
Travel through time. Choose an era. Live it.

This experience focuses on the ordinary person throughout history, a historically based slice of life.

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

TW:
History. That’s the only reason I added DD. Because history… some parts of it are kind of messed up.

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Scenario:
You make one yourself—you’re the gamemaster… ish. You live through history, whether it’s ancient Egypt or the 1970s—it’s all up to you.

I made this because there are no historical-based RPGs… Also, this isn’t focused on wars or major historical events, just the slice-of-life of an ordinary person. Does that stop you from being a noble and living the noble life during the Renaissance? No.

Do whatever you want!

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

ANY POV should work, I think, I didn’t specify genders anywhere.

I don’t know how this will go for JLLM users. Honestly, I feel for you, because JLLM is… not great. It should work, though. But again, this is very experimental; I’ve only tested it with DeepSeek.

If you want to use a good AI, something like Gemini…ish (I haven’t used it enough), I recommend Z.ai. I use it through Chutes, but there are other ways to set it up, and I think it’s free? Honestly, I’m not entirely sure myself.

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Personal Note:
I didn’t have much passion for creating a “real” bot, but I did for creating an RPG. Yeah… it might flop, but whatever.

If this bot turns out bad, let me know. I’ll take it private and try to fix it, I guess.

Otherwise, enjoy it!

I’ll post regular bots… someday.

Uh, do y’all like the art? Personally, I think it fits the historical theme really well. I might make more bots in this style when focusing on history, or maybe even fantasy.

Using a pre-existing OC set in a period is highly recommended.
creator: Munkenns
